data.title: Update Task Design reviewer atomicity dimension to use 3-gate definitions
data.description:
## Summary
Replace the atomicity dimension "4 or 5" and "below 4" descriptions in task-design.md with the 3-gate framework using identical gate language from SKILL.md (copy-paste, verified by key predicate substring matching). Remove "Acceptable bundling" exception. The "below 4" column should describe violations of each gate.

## Identical Gate Language Definition
The gate definitions must be copy-pasted from the SKILL.md definitions. Verified by checking that the same key predicate substrings appear in both files (not by diff, since surrounding structural context differs — SKILL.md uses bullet list, task-design.md uses table cell).

## TDD Exemption
Static assets only (criterion 3 — Markdown documentation, no executable conditional logic).

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/docs/reviewers/plan/task-design.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Gate 1 present in atomicity dimension
  Verify: grep -q 'Gate 1.*testable behavior\|must produce testable behavior' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/docs/reviewers/plan/task-design.md
- [ ] Gate 2 present
  Verify: grep -q 'Gate 2.*codebase.*green\|leave.*codebase.*green' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/docs/reviewers/plan/task-design.md
- [ ] Gate 3 present
  Verify: grep -q 'Gate 3.*split\|not.*possible.*split.*further' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/docs/reviewers/plan/task-design.md
- [ ] Gate 1 anti-pattern present (same as SKILL.md)
  Verify: grep -q 'grep.*existence.*not.*valid\|grepping.*not.*valid' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/docs/reviewers/plan/task-design.md
- [ ] Acceptable bundling exception removed
  Verify: ! grep -q 'Acceptable bundling' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/docs/reviewers/plan/task-design.md
- [ ] Below 4 column describes gate violations
  Verify: grep -q 'Gate.*violat\|fail.*Gate\|does not.*Gate' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/docs/reviewers/plan/task-design.md
